Creates a NAMESPACE_CONTAINS edge and sets ATL_NAME_LABEL on the child."}},"title":"AgentNameRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"AGENT_ROOT()":{"notice":"Backward-compat accessor returning namehash(\"agent\"). Existing         callers that read `AGENT_ROOT` keep compiling without changes."},"getRoots()":{"notice":"Enumerate every initialized root."},"initializeRoot(address,address)":{"notice":"Backward-compat shim. Initializes the .agent root with KIND_AGENT.         Prefer the multi-root signature above for new callers."},"initializeRoot(string,address,address,bytes32)":{"notice":"Initialize a TLD root."},"isRoot(bytes32)":{"notice":"Roots indexed by node \u2014 `true` iff `_records[node]` was initialized via `initializeRoot`."},"namehashRoot(string)":{"notice":"Pure namehash for a top-level label (parent = bytes32(0))."},"register(bytes32,string,address,address,uint64)":{"notice":"Register a child name under a parent."},"rootByLabel(string)":{"notice":"Look up a root by its TLD label. Returns bytes32(0) if not initialized."},"rootKind(bytes32)":{"notice":"Per-root kind tag (e.g. keccak256(\"namespace:Agent\"), \"namespace:Geo\", \"namespace:PeopleGroup\")."}},"notice":"Multi-root hierarchical name registry. Names are keyed by node (bytes32 namehash). Each node has an owner (an AgentAccount), a resolver, and an optional subregistry delegate.   \u26a0 Multi-root since 2026-04: a single registry instance can host any     number of TLD roots \u2014 `.agent`, `.geo`, `.pg`, \u2026  \u2014 each initialized     by `initializeRoot(label, owner, resolver, kind)` and discoverable via     `getRoots()` / `isRoot(node)`. The legacy `AGENT_ROOT()` accessor     remains as a pure helper that returns `namehash(\"agent\")` so existing     callers continue to compile and read the canonical .agent root.   The `kind` field on each root is an opaque tag (e.g.   keccak256(\"namespace:Agent\"), \"namespace:Geo\", \"namespace:PeopleGroup\")   that downstream contracts/SDKs use to dispatch to the right resource   binding (GeoFeatureRegistry for .geo, PgRegistry for .pg, etc.). The   registry itself does not enforce kind semantics \u2014 that lives in the   resource binders. ENS v2 principles adopted:   - Each name can have its own subregistry for child management   - Longest-suffix resolution via resolver hierarchy   - Registry/resolver separation Smart-account-native differences from ENS:   - Ownership via AgentAccount.isOwner(), not ERC-1155   - On register, creates NAMESPACE_CONTAINS edge in AgentRelationship   - Sets ATL_NAME_LABEL on agent via AgentAccountResolver","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentNameRegistry.sol":"AgentNameRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AgentNameRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x320b75377fd5aebbf36f0e3ab6ff01036ce0f548936d69fd6253f0ec0cddaafc","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fbfaecd9dd57883a9dfe76dd8ef1d1f9d1784ea2b553b1b9812fcee6aa77d2bd","dweb:/ipfs/QmTmwCMGr6b4UMeT7ZHDuwx7PRqR3jxmANghUAiCYQpYJ5"]},"src/AgentRelationship.sol":{"keccak256":"0x79063025928424d79229b22cb8c68783ac9ff3527cb5f2b2a92cf44aaf56a3bf","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://448c147db1a31c6526a37a05fe4be4dbd161984b2832e5ee552dc876c48c1762","dweb:/ipfs/QmYBgjKDKHRXrdLkvK7FZwisnfed4qnf764Atb3YXtmuW3"]}},"version":1}

params.kind: Opaque tag (KIND_AGENT, KIND_GEO, …) used by SDK / resource binders.
params.label: TLD label without leading dot (e.g. "agent", "geo", "pg").
params.resolverContract: The default resolver for the root.
params.rootOwner: The AgentAccount (or EOA) that will own the root.

register(bytes32,string,address,address,.details: Caller must be parent's owner (via isOwner) or parent's subregistry.      Creates a NAMESPACE_CONTAINS edge and sets ATL_NAME_LABEL on the child.

AGENT_ROOT().notice: Backward-compat accessor returning namehash("agent"). Existing         callers that read `AGENT_ROOT` keep compiling without changes.

initializeRoot(address,address).notice: Backward-compat shim. Initializes the .agent root with KIND_AGENT.         Prefer the multi-root signature above for new callers.

isRoot(bytes32).notice: Roots indexed by node — `true` iff `_records[node]` was initialized via `initializeRoot`.

namehashRoot(string).notice: Pure namehash for a top-level label (parent = bytes32(0)).

register(bytes32,string,address,address,.notice: Register a child name under a parent.

rootByLabel(string).notice: Look up a root by its TLD label. Returns bytes32(0) if not initialized.
